name: Too-Easy Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a microwavable dish. Microwave on HIGH for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring after each minute.
2. Remove from microwave and stir until completely melted.
3. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating until well blended.
5. Add the melted chocolate and vanilla; mix well.
6. Refrigerate about 1 hour.
7. Shape into 1-inch balls.
8. Roll in nuts or coconut.
9. Store in refrigerator. Makes about 5 dozen truffles.
Variation: To flavor truffles with liqueurs, omit vanilla. Divide the truffle mixture into thirds. Add 1 tablespoon of liqueur (almond, coffee, or orange) to each third mixture; mix well.
